paragraphs.zh: 我是袁修玮，北京理工大学车辆工程专业硕士在读，本科毕业于武汉理工大学车辆工程专业。当前以线控底盘与电机控制为核心方向，实践覆盖车载电动执行器多闭环控制、线控制动冗余与故障降级、混合动力双电机 FOC / LADRC 以及车规控制器部署。
paragraphs.en: I'm Yuan Xiuwei, an M.S. candidate in Vehicle Engineering at Beijing Institute of Technology, with a B.E. in Vehicle Engineering from Wuhan University of Technology. My primary focus is chassis-by-wire and motor control, spanning cascaded electric-actuator control, brake-by-wire redundancy and degradation, dual-motor FOC / LADRC, and automotive controller deployment.

paragraphs.zh: 具备从控制策略建模、状态机设计、自动代码与集成，到 CAN 标定、底层追踪和台架验证的开发链路经验；熟悉 Simulink / Stateflow、CANape、Lauterbach、AUTOSAR、AURIX TC387，并能使用 C/C++ 与 Python 完成嵌入式开发和工程自动化。
paragraphs.en: Experienced across the control-development workflow, from strategy modeling, state-machine design, code integration, and deployment to CAN calibration, low-level tracing, and bench validation. Familiar with Simulink / Stateflow, CANape, Lauterbach, AUTOSAR, AURIX TC387, C/C++, and Python automation.

value.zh: 线控底盘 · 电机控制 · 车规控制器开发
